action_library_changes_tail_size.description: Changing the action library materially changes adaptive-search tail exposure.

bias_strength_increases_uct_tail.description: Increasing reward optimism in the pocket increases the UCT tail event size.

calibration_sweep_finds_repair_backfire_.description: The expansion sweep finds a reduced-budget counterexample to the broad claim that uncertainty penalties always help.

cliff_true_model_has_low_gap.description: MCTS with the true Gymnasium transition table must have near-zero selected-return optimism gap.

cliff_uct_concentrates_on_shortcut.description: UCT MCTS must expose the learned cliff-shortcut bias more than the behavioral static pool.

cliff_uct_gap_exceeds_static.description: On Gymnasium CliffWalking-v1, UCT MCTS must amplify learned shortcut optimism relative to a behavioral static rollout pool.

cliff_uncertainty_avoids_shortcut.description: Uncertainty-penalized MCTS must reduce learned cliff-shortcut exposure.

cliff_uncertainty_improves_true_return.description: Uncertainty-penalized MCTS must improve true CliffWalking return over UCT.

cliff_uncertainty_reduces_gap.description: Uncertainty-penalized MCTS must reduce the CliffWalking selected-return optimism gap.

closed_loop_uncertainty_reduces_mean_pla.description: In receding-horizon replay, uncertainty-aware search lowers mean per-step planning optimism.

dynamics_drift_changes_tail_size.description: Changing transition drift toward the goal materially changes UCT tail optimism.

exploration_constant_changes_tail_size.description: UCT tail size is sensitive to the exploration constant rather than being a single fixed-parameter accident.

horizon_budget_changes_tail_size.description: Lookahead and budget materially change UCT branch-capture tail exposure.

paired_result_is_tail_not_dominance.description: The paired-seed result is a rare-tail claim, not a dominance claim.

penalty_sweep_finds_low_tail_region.description: The penalty sweep finds a low-tail region rather than relying on the original repair knob.

start_state_changes_tail_exposure.description: Tail exposure depends on the geometric relationship between the start state and the bias pocket.

strong_uncertainty_controls_high_bias_ta.description: The strong uncertainty penalty controls the high-bias tail stress case.

strong_uncertainty_penalty_reduces_captu.description: A stronger uncertainty penalty collapses the largest UCT capture event.

uct_mean_gap_exceeds_static_at_1024.description: UCT MCTS has a larger mean selected-return optimism gap than the static pool at budget 1024.

uct_tail_is_rare_not_dominance.description: UCT branch capture is a rare large-tail event, not paired-seed dominance.

uct_tail_max_exceeds_static_at_1024.description: UCT MCTS has a larger worst branch-capture event than the static pool.

uncertainty_repair_reduces_mean_and_q90.description: Uncertainty MCTS reduces both mean and upper-tail optimism in the full run.

uncertainty_strength_alone_does_not_fix_.description: Changing only the uncertainty amplitude does not remove the reduced-budget penalty-induced capture case.
